zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，关注支撑位]
zh.content:
当前雪崩币（AVAX）在9.2648美元附近震荡整理，24小时变化为-0.71%。从价格走势来看，AVAX在9.2437美元至9.3445美元区间内波动，显示出市场在此区域内的犹豫态度。若价格持续维持在此范围内，可能会形成横盘整理的格局，待市场情绪进一步明朗。

在技术指标方面，MACD目前为负值，显示出卖方力量略强于买方，但由于信号线缺失，难以做出明确判断。相对强弱指数（RSI）数据缺失，无法提供超买或超卖的具体信息。需要密切关注未来几日的指标变化，以判断市场的买卖力量。

从支撑和阻力位来看，9.2437美元是重要的支撑位，若跌破该水平，可能会引发进一步下行，甚至测试较低的支撑区间。而9.3445美元则是当前的阻力位，若价格突破这一水平，则有可能引发短期反弹，进一步挑战更高的价位。

交易建议方面，短期内建议投资者保持观望，待价格突破关键阻力位或跌破支撑位后再考虑入场。同时，设定合理的止损位，以降低潜在风险。投资者应关注市场情绪和整体趋势变化，灵活调整策略。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche (AVAX) is currently trading at 9.2648, reflecting a slight decline of 0.71% over the last 24 hours. This price action suggests a bearish trend in the short term, especially as the asset hovers near the lower end of its daily range of 9.2437 to 9.3445. A closer examination of recent price movements indicates a potential for further downside if selling pressure persists, particularly if the price breaches the lower support level of 9.2437, which could open the door for a move towards the next support at around 9.00.

The absence of the RSI value makes it challenging to assess the momentum, but the MACD reading of -0.031143071 indicates a bearish crossover, suggesting that downward momentum is building. Traders should be cautious if the MACD continues to trend lower, as this may trigger additional selling. The SMA(20) at 9.30779 serves as a crucial resistance point; if AVAX can regain this level, it may signal a potential reversal or bullish correction. Conversely, failing to reclaim this moving average could reinforce the current bearish sentiment.

In terms of support and resistance, the immediate support level is 9.2437, which has shown resilience in recent trading sessions. If this level fails, traders should look for the next significant support around 9.00. On the resistance side, the SMA(20) at 9.30779 will be a key level to watch. A sustained breakout above this level could indicate a shift in momentum, potentially leading to a retest of the recent high at 9.3445.

Given the current market dynamics, traders might consider short positions if the price breaks below 9.2437, targeting the 9.00 support level. Conversely, those looking for long opportunities should wait for a confirmed breakout above the SMA(20) at 9.30779 before entering. Proper risk management strategies should be employed, including setting stop-loss orders to protect against unexpected volatility.
